board_brief: Fire alarm panel sub-DB (DB-FA1) for a generic IEC commercial 3-storey office. 63A TPN intake fed from MSB-MAIN F04 (63A MCB Type C). NO upstream RCD per IEC 60364-5-56 §560 life-safety exemption. 6 circuits: FA panel power supply + 3 zone detector loops + sounder/strobe + battery charger. Located adjacent to building main entrance / FA installer access point.

standards_stack.fire_alarm_system_standard: IEC 62820 (building intercom + fire alarm systems) + ISO 7240-2 control & indicating equipment

supply.fed_from: MSB-MAIN F04 63A MCB Type C (NO upstream RCD per IEC 60364-5-56 §560)
supply.system_type: TN-S (utility transformer earthed; building distribution TN-S)

board.location: adjacent to building main entrance — FA installer/serviceman access point
